creator: junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr
text:
>>>>> "Jun" == Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@FreeBSD.ORG> writes:

    Jun>   Is there special reason to use '?=' insteas of '=' ?

No.
I didn't know about that. I just read man make(1).

    Jun> --- kaistfonts/Makefile
    >  DISTFILES?= kaist-newmj18.bdf.gz ks_philgi16.bdf.gz \
    > kaist-newmj16.bdf.gz ks_iyagi16.bdf.gz
    Jun> ---

    Jun>   It seems good although replacing '?=' with '='.

Yes, I think so.
